metadata.title: Cognote — AI Note-Taking App for Students
metadata.description: Cognote is the AI-powered note-taking app that lets you search your handwriting, convert whiteboards into notes, and ask AI about anything you wrote. Your secret edge over your classmates.

hero.headline:
Your secret edge over
your classmates.
hero.subheadline: Handwrite freely. Search everything. Ask AI anything.

0.subtitle: Handwriting Search
0.title:
Find any word
you ever wrote.
0.description: Type a keyword and Cognote instantly searches through all your handwritten notes — no scanning, no manual tagging. It just works.

1.subtitle: Board to Note
1.title:
Turn your board
into clean notes.
1.description: Photograph a whiteboard or chalkboard and Cognote converts it into a structured, searchable note. Never lose a lecture again.

2.subtitle: Ask AI
2.title:
Ask anything
about your notes.
2.description: Stuck on a concept? Ask AI to explain, solve, or expand on what you've written. It reads your notes and answers in context.

cta.headline: Ready for your edge?
cta.subheadline: Join thousands of students who study smarter with Cognote.

items.q: How does Cognote handwriting search work?
items.a: Cognote uses on-device OCR to index everything you write. Just type a keyword and it instantly finds matching handwritten notes — no scanning or manual tagging needed.

items.q: Can Cognote convert whiteboard photos into notes?
items.a: Yes. The Board to Note feature lets you photograph any whiteboard or chalkboard and converts it into a clean, searchable digital note.

items.q: What AI features does Cognote have?
items.a: Cognote uses Google Gemini AI to let you ask questions about your notes, get explanations, solve problems, and more — all in context with what you wrote.
Cognote has a free tier that lets you create up to 3 notes. Paid plans unlock unlimited notes, AI features, and cloud sync.
Yes. Notes and handwriting search work fully offline. AI features require an internet connection.

privacy.headline: Privacy Policy
privacy.s1Title: Your Data Stays on Your Device
privacy.s1: Your notes and drawings are stored locally on your device and are never uploaded to our servers without your explicit consent.
privacy.s2: When you use AI features, selected content is securely transmitted to Google's Gemini API for processing and is not retained after the response is generated.
privacy.s3: We do not sell, share, or monetize your personal data or note content.
privacy.s4: Subscription and payment information is handled securely through Apple's App Store and is never accessed or stored by Cognote directly.
privacy.s5: We collect minimal anonymous analytics solely to improve app performance and user experience.
privacy.s6: For users under 13, parental consent is required as per COPPA regulations.
privacy.agreement: By using Cognote, you agree to these terms.
